content: Prism data-quality and provenance reference. Prism is a data-quality and reconciliation tool: it explains why provider assessments of the same issuer disagree, and it never fabricates a rating for a provider that does not publish one. Every provider claim traces to a source document reference, and every red flag carries evidence references. The provider cards in this corpus are clearly labeled synthetic and illustrative; they are a reproducible substrate for reconciliation and are not presented as real provider data. Real provider assessments, when available, supersede the synthetic cards while the same reconciliation logic applies unchanged.
disclaimer: Illustrative reference for Prism data-quality and provenance principles.
